calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF EMILIO RAMIREZ MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Answers to Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition filed. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
